summary: A clip from a Fox Business interview. A woman with long hair speaks to camera from a Washington, D.C., remote position, labeled in the lower-third TRICIA MCLAUGHLIN | DHS PUBLIC AFFAIRS ASSISTANT SECRETARY. A later frame adds an inset of a man in a dark suit and red tie seated in an office. The banner reads ANTI-ICE PROTESTERS STORM NOLA COUNCIL MEETING, with a market-data ticker along the bottom.
